title: geum × hainesianum
intro: Geum × hainesianum, also known as the Haines' Avens, is a hybrid plant species within the geum genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that have been utilized for centuries, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to expel dampness and heat from the body. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and possessing anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Geum × hainesianum can be found in the form of tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
